seasonTagline: You emanate a grounded warmth, glowing in rich, deep, and earthy jewel tones that reflect your intense and vibrant natural coloring.
skinDescription: Your skin is a deep, rich brown with a noticeable golden and warm undertone, appearing radiant and luminous.
hairDescription: Your hair is a deep black, providing a strong frame for your face and enhancing your overall deep coloring.
eyeDescription: Your eyes are a deep, warm brown, almost black, and perfectly complement the richness of your skin and hair.
seasonStory: Your coloring is characterized by its undeniable depth and warmth, reminiscent of the most vibrant elements of autumn. You possess a luxurious blend of deep, rich tones that create a naturally striking and harmonious appearance. This powerful combination allows you to beautifully wear intense, grounded colors.

bestColors.name: Forest Green
bestColors.reason: Enhances your deep features with a rich, natural warmth.

bestColors.name: Burgundy
bestColors.reason: A sophisticated deep red that harmonizes with your warm, rich undertone.

bestColors.name: Deep Rust
bestColors.reason: Reflects the warm, earthy depth in your skin and eyes.

bestColors.name: Espresso
bestColors.reason: A profound neutral that mirrors your deep hair and eye color beautifully.

bestColors.name: Ochre
bestColors.reason: A grounding, warm yellow-brown that brings out your skin's golden quality.

bestColors.name: Deep Mustard
bestColors.reason: Adds a vibrant, earthy accent that complements your warm depth.

bestColors.name: Warm Plum
bestColors.reason: A deep, rich purple with warm undertones that suits your powerful palette.

bestColors.name: Camel
bestColors.reason: A warm, sophisticated neutral that highlights your golden undertones.

bestColors.name: Olive
bestColors.reason: An earthy green that beautifully complements your warm and deep features.

bestColors.name: Dark Chocolate Brown
bestColors.reason: A rich, deep neutral that connects to your hair and eye depth.

bestColors.name: Deep Teal
bestColors.reason: A rich, warm blue-green that provides a luxurious accent.

bestColors.name: Pumpkin
bestColors.reason: A vibrant, deep orange that matches your natural warmth and clarity.

avoidColors.name: Baby Pink
avoidColors.reason: Too light and cool, it would wash out your deep warmth.

avoidColors.name: Icy Blue
avoidColors.reason: Too cool and pale, it would clash with your warm, deep coloring.

avoidColors.name: Bright Magenta
avoidColors.reason: Too cool and vibrant, it would overpower your rich natural tones.

foundation.tip: Look for foundations with rich, warm, or golden undertones to match your skin's depth and warmth.

celebrities.name: Halle Berry
celebrities.reason: Deep skin with golden undertones, dark hair, and rich brown eyes.

celebrities.name: Eva Mendes
celebrities.reason: Warm, deep coloring with dark hair and eyes, thriving in earthy jewel tones.

celebrities.name: Kerry Washington
celebrities.reason: Rich, deep skin with warmth, dark hair, and eyes, creating a strong contrast.

celebrities.name: Naomi Campbell
celebrities.reason: Very deep skin with warm undertones, dark hair, and clear, deep features.
